objective: docs-site liquid-glass design refactor + hover menubar + motion + production SEO, ship to GitHub Pages (see host goal for full spec)

workPhases.title: Liquid-glass design system + hover menubar + motion + SEO baseline

tasks.title: Design Read + tokens: custom.css with glass tokens, pill chrome, typography, light/dark
Header override: floating glass bar + desktop hover dropdown nav, mobile intact
Landing hero motion + scroll-reveal cards, prefers-reduced-motion gated
SEO: robots.txt, sitemap check, JSON-LD, og:type/site_name/theme-color
bun run build passes; dist contains sitemap + robots + JSON-LD

workPhases.title: Visual verification + parallel gpt-5.5 subagent audit + fixes

tasks.title: Screenshots desktop 1440 + mobile 390, light + dark, en + ko; view_image checked
Dispatch gpt-5.5 subagents: design/a11y audit + SEO audit in parallel

workPhases.title: User polish round: ima2 hero asset, Geist+Pretendard fonts, dynamic pill header width, heavier fake-glass blur, SVG icons, more scroll box motion

tasks.title: ima2 hero field background asset (soft-focus organic, light+dark) wired into .lp-hero-field
Typography: Geist Variable + Pretendard Variable, mono accent kept
Pill header: max-width centered, fluid side margins (dynamic left-right)
Glass blur raised for frosted fake-glass feel (header/dropdown/modal)
Inline SVG icons in bento cells + sitemap group heads
Scroll-driven box motions strengthened; build + visual verify

workPhases.title: Ship: commit dev, push, merge main, CI green, live check

tasks.title: deploy-docs workflow green, live URL 200 with new CSS

criteria.scenario: docs-site builds cleanly with new design system
criteria.expectedEvidence: bun run build exit 0 log; dist/ contains sitemap-index.xml, robots.txt; index.html has JSON-LD script
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun run build exit 0 (49 pages); dist/robots.txt + dist/sitemap-index.xml present; JSON-LD script in dist/index.html; zh-cn/ko sub-agent-surface fallback pages built (260709 23:21)

criteria.scenario: Glass header with working desktop hover dropdown; mobile hamburger unaffected
criteria.expectedEvidence: Screenshots at 1440px showing dropdown open on hover; 390px showing mobile menu works
criteria.capturedEvidence: agbrowse screenshots 260709: 1440px light/dark hero field + hover dropdown open (screenshot_1783605830425), 390px mobile stacked CTAs (screenshot_1783606900760), ko landing/guide (screenshot_1783606939571/941373), pill header (screenshot_1783607464991)

criteria.expectedEvidence: CSS grep showing animations wrapped in no-preference media query or reduced-motion override
criteria.capturedEvidence: custom.css: all @keyframes/transition/animation-timeline rules inside @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference); Header.astro dropdown transitions disabled under prefers-reduced-motion: reduce

criteria.scenario: No unresolved P1 design/a11y/SEO blockers from gpt-5.5 subagent audits
criteria.expectedEvidence: Audit findings list + fix commits or rebuttals recorded
criteria.capturedEvidence: gpt-5.5 audits: Planck design/a11y FAIL->4 findings all fixed (PageTitle override + skip-link h1#_top, sitemap band for mobile nav coverage, terminal role=img removed, dropdown click toggle + aria-expanded/controls); Franklin SEO FAIL->og:locale en_US/ko_KR/zh_CN + landing titles fixed, non-landing og:locale rebutted as Starlight upstream default (P3)

criteria.scenario: New design live on GitHub Pages
criteria.expectedEvidence: gh run success for deploy-docs on main; curl -I live URL 200; live HTML references new CSS
criteria.capturedEvidence: commit 73b5a9b pushed to origin dev + main (1593f3e..73b5a9b); gh run 29027353465 (Deploy Docs) exit 0 and 29027353462 (Cross-platform CI) exit 0; live https://lidge-jun.github.io/opencodex/ HTTP/2 200 serving new landing (Run Codex on any LLM, lp-hero-field, hero-field-light webp); robots.txt 200; /ko/guides/sub-agent-surface/ 200

criteria.scenario: Polish round verified: fonts render (Geist/Pretendard), header pill contained + fluid, frosted blur visible, SVG icons present, scroll motions active, build passes
criteria.expectedEvidence: build log + screenshots (desktop/mobile, light/dark, en/ko) after polish
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun run build 49 pages OK after polish; ima2 assets hero-field-light/dark.png (2048x1152, gpt image high) wired via astro:assets picture layer with gradient fallback; Geist Variable + Pretendard Variable installed and set in --sl-font; pill header max-width 78rem centered; glass blur 40px; Lucide-path SVG icons in 6 bento h3 + 4 sitemap heads; alternating slide-in scroll motions. Screenshots: light photographic hero (1783608281975), dark dusk hero (1783608327963), ko (1783608330015); computed .lp-btn-primary dark bg rgb(244,244,244).
